description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a modern yet slightly traditional architectural style, featuring a mix of flat and low-pitched roofs. The exterior is finished in muted gray and beige tones, complemented by white window frames and a prominent front porch area with a small garden. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway with a carport, a backyard with a circular above-ground pool, and several mature trees and landscaped areas. The house is surrounded by a low fence and features both paved and green outdoor spaces. Decorative elements such as a pergola, patio furniture, and a water tank add to the urban residential character.
description: A two-story modern house with a flat and low-pitched roof, large windows, a front porch, carport, and landscaped yard with trees and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, front porch, carport, and lush garden with trees and flowers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, water tank, and backyard patio area with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, above-ground pool, patio furniture, and more of the garden landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, water tank, and additional garden features, with the house's rear and side windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, white columns, and a decorative garden area.
